fields.value:
ONLY OBJECTIVE: Find and Report issues with this Unreal 5.6.1 application run.
use the unreal parsing tool ONCE: mcp_run_unreal_diagnostic_parser with spike id {{spike.provenance.id}}
after doing that you may also inspect the record.
mcp_inspect_record Spike {{spike.provenance.id}}
Found issues should be checked against your engrams.
You should enhance relative Engrams and may create Engrams for new issues.
You may not stray from the objective.
Try to finish quickly.
Once you think you have tagged all issues, use mcp_done to file a report and end.

ONLY OBJECTIVE: Find and Report issues with this Unreal 5.6.1 application run.
The unreal parsing tool is helpful: mcp_run_unreal_diagnostic_parser with spike id {{spike.provenance.id}}
after doing that you may consider inspecting the record.
mcp_inspect_record Spike {{spike.provenance.id}}
Found issues should be checked against your engrams.
You should enhance relative Engrams and may create Engrams for new issues.
You may not stray from the objective.
Try to finish quickly.
Once you think you have tagged all issues, use mcp_done to file a report and end.
